---
title: "Sliced Wasserstein for Scalable Distribution Alignment (Domain Adaptation)"
date: 2026-06-24
categories: [GDL + COT]
---

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)]()
- [Mathematical Framework](mathematical_framework.md)

---
